title: gutierrezia neaeana
intro: Gutierrezia neaeana, also known as Resinweed, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its small yellow flowers and sticky resinous leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Gutierrezia neaeana include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease pain, and promote healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. The plant's herbal preparations include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
